description: Strict boolean — only [1] truthy, only [] falsy, everything else panics

Run tests, verify panic tests fail (currently don't panic)

Fix existing runtime tests that rely on old truthiness
Run all runtime tests, verify pass

Replace @(ident) with $ident, @$var with $var

Run all E2E tests, verify pass
